title: My Weigh Triton T3R 500 Rechargeable Digital Pocket Scale 500g x 0.01g Black
features: Rechargeable Battery - Includes a Rechargeable Lithium-Ion Battery with 40 hours of continuous use when fully charged
Precision - Weighs up to 500g with a Precision of 0.01g
Tough Design - Has a IPS ( Impact Protection System) in place, and is tough with non-slip rubber and grip ribs
Advanced Digital Weighing Technology - Full Tare Feature | Zero Tracking | Digital Auto-Calibration (Weights not included) | Units: G, OZ, DWT, OZT, GN, CT
Easy to use - Includes a backlit display for when it's dark, a removeable cover, a stainles steel tray and comes with a USB charging cable
description: The MyWeigh Triton T3R Digital Scale measures 500g x 0.01g and features rechargeable Li-ion battery. 5.5" x 0.8" x 3". USB charging cable included. Weighs in: Grams, Ounces, DWT, OZT, GN, CT
